# Product.Library.LibraryType

**Enumeration**

The different types of a library product.

## Declaration

```swift
enum LibraryType
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **Product.Library.LibraryType.dynamic**: A dynamically linked library.
- **Product.Library.LibraryType.static**: A statically linked library.

## Describing a Library Product

- **targets**: The names of the targets in this product.
- **type**: The type of the library.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable

items.description: The names of the targets in this product.
